REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (601 Van Ness Ave. Apt 744, San Francisco, Ca 94102)
Off Calendar Dec-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, for the San Francisco Administrator, Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $525,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Petitioner.

At the onset, the court commends the San Francisco Public Administrator's efforts in attempting to determine Damian Flores' whereabouts. Counsel reports that a letter had been sent to the last know address for Mr. Flores and that it had been returned with a handwritten note stating that he had passed away.

The Petition for Letters of Administration will be taken under submission with the intent to grant but counsel is asked to please continue their efforts to determine Mr. Flores' whereabouts prior to distribution.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Continued To May-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
